meaning: n.技术恐惧(指对技术对社会及环境造成不良影响的恐惧)
examples: Simple technophobia is not usually the reason.
Another reason not to get too excited is the reflexive conservatism and technophobia of medical folk.
Another reason computer networks are not used more widely and creatively is technophobia.
Feeding off a mix of millennial angst and residual technophobia, Wobbler is just one of numerous virus hoaxes circulating by e-mail.
